text.title: Product Manager Methodologies Index
text.summary: Complete index of all 33 methodologies in the product-manager skill, organized by domain, with a quick selection guide mapping PM tasks to methodology slugs.

list.item: mvp-scoping: Teams build too much before validation. Output: core problem, minimum features, 4-week constraint.
mlp-planning: MVP works but users do not love it. Output: WOW moments, delight features, MLP phases.
feature-prioritization-rice: Too many features, limited resources. Formula: RICE = (Reach x Impact x Confidence) / Effort.
feature-prioritization-moscow: Stakeholders disagree on priorities. Buckets: Must/Should/Could/Won't (60%/20%/10%/0%).
roadmap-design: No clear development direction. Output: Now-Next-Later with milestones and 20% buffer.
user-story-mapping: Features lack user context. Structure: Activities to Tasks to Releases.
release-planning: Unclear work for upcoming sprint. Output: Sprint goal, capacity, velocity.
product-launch: No clear release timeline. Output: Release goal, effort, sprints plus 20% buffer.
okr-setting: Goals are vague or unmeasurable. Framework: Objective plus 3-5 Key Results plus Initiatives.
problem-validation: Building solutions for non-problems. Output: 5+ interviews, competitor analysis, search volume.
product-discovery: Root cause not understood. Method: Five Whys (5 levels deep).
jobs-to-be-done: Features do not match user needs. Format: When [situation], I want [motivation], So I can [outcome].
business-model-research: Business model not structured. Framework: Lean Canvas (9 blocks).
value-proposition-design: Product-market fit unclear. Framework: Customer segment plus Value map.
niche-evaluation: Too many opportunities. Output: Weighted scoring (market size, competition, fit, monetization).
backlog-management: Backlog items unclear or oversized. Principles: DEEP, Definition of Ready.
stakeholder-management: Features disconnected from goals. Chain: Goal to Actor to Impact to Deliverable.
risk-assessment: Unknown risks in product decisions. Method: Impact x Uncertainty matrix, test high-risk first.
continuous-discovery-habits: Building weekly customer touchpoint habits.
feedback-management: Collecting, triaging, and acting on user feedback.
minimum-product-frameworks: Choosing among MVP, MLP, MMP, MAC, RAT, MDP, MVA, MFP, SLC.
mlp-planning: Evolving from MVP to Minimum Lovable Product via 4-layer audit.
competitive-positioning: Market positioning against competitors.
portfolio-strategy: Multi-product portfolio management.
product-led-growth: PLG strategy and implementation.
experimentation-at-scale: Scaling experiments to 100+ per year with statistical rigor.
learning-speed-competitive-moat: Organizational learning velocity as competitive advantage.
product-lifecycle: Introduction, Growth, Maturity, Decline stage management.
product-analytics: Analytics and measurement frameworks.
technical-debt-management: Technical debt registration, scoring, and paydown strategy.
Define MVP: mvp-scoping.
Add delight to MVP: mlp-planning.
Choose right minimum product framework: minimum-product-frameworks.
Choose next feature: feature-prioritization-rice OR feature-prioritization-moscow.
Create roadmap: roadmap-design.
Set team goals: okr-setting.
Validate idea: problem-validation, jobs-to-be-done.
Launch product: product-launch.
Manage backlog: backlog-management.
Build discovery habit: continuous-discovery-habits.
Scale experiments: experimentation-at-scale.
Act on user feedback: feedback-management.
Assess product stage: product-lifecycle.
Address technical debt: technical-debt-management.
Build learning velocity moat: learning-speed-competitive-moat.
